scripts.test: bun run test:api || true; bun run test:ui || true
scripts.test:strict: sh -c 'bun run test:api; a=$?; bun run test:ui; b=$?; if [ $a -ne 0 ] || [ $b -ne 0 ]; then exit 1; fi'
scripts.allure:clean: rm -rf allure-results allure-results-api allure-results-ui allure-report test-results
scripts.allure:merge: sh -c 'rm -rf allure-results && mkdir -p allure-results && if [ -d allure-results-api ]; then cp -R allure-results-api/* allure-results/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -d allure-results-ui ]; then cp -R allure-results-ui/* allure-results/ 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
scripts.allure:generate:merged: bun run allure:merge && bun run allure:generate
scripts.allure:local: bun run allure:clean && (bun run test:api:allure || true) && (bun run test:ui:allure || true) && bun run allure:generate:merged
